Information We CollectInformation we collect includes both information you knowingly and actively provide us when using or participating in any of our services and promotions, and any information automatically sent by your devices in the course of accessing our products and services.

Log DataWhen you visit our website, our servers may automatically log the standard data provided by your web browser. It may include your deviceâ€™s Internet Protocol (IP) address, your browser type and version, the pages you visit, the time and date of your visit, the time spent on each page, other details about your visit, and technical details that occur in conjunction with any errors you may encounter.
Please be aware that while this information may not be personally identified by itself, it may be possible to combine it with other data to personally identify individual persons.

Personal DataPersonal data refers to personally identifiable information that specifically identifies you as an individual (e.g. your name, email address). We do NOT collect, store or use any of your Personal Data.If you contact us by email, then we will use your email address only for the purpose of contacting you. This will be only in response to a communication from you.
User Entered DataAll data entered into the applications by you remain on your device. We never pass this data and we never use it.

Device DataNon-personal data refers to information that, by itself, does not personally identify you. We may collect non-personal data such as your device model number, operating system version, country code, and other properties for purpose of managing the applications.                                We use third-party analytics services to help anonymously monitor app usage and identify potential issues. This is purely a means to help us improve the

Location DataVideo Calls, Voice & Text Chat App collects location data to enable "People and Groups Nearby"  when the app is in the foreground.Video Calls, Voice & Text Chat App collects location data to enable to sharing of live location app needs access to user location all the time including while the app is in the background.

When you share your live location in any chat or turn on the Make me visible" feature in the People Nearby menu, Video Calls, Voice & Text Chat App will use your data to display your location to users who are nearby even when the app is closed until you deactivate the feature

Uploading User's Contact ListVideo Calls, Voice & Text Chat App has a communication feature. If you want and give consent , you can provide your mobile number and basic account data (which may include profile name, profile picture, and about information) to create a Leo Video Call Account.

To make it easier for your contacts and other people to reach you and recognize who you are, we fetch your contacts with your permission to notify other users. We do not require your screen name to be your real name. Note that users who have you in their contacts will see you by the name they saved and not by your screen name.

Changes to This PolicyAt our discretion, we may change our privacy policy to reflect updates to our business processes, current acceptable practices, or legislative or regulatory changes.
